argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const tweetId = '{{ url }}'.match(/\/status\/(\d+)/)?.[1]; if (!tweetId) return { error: 'Invalid tweet URL' }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const primary = document.querySelector('[data-testid="primaryColumn"]'); if (!primary) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const article = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article')).find(a => a.querySelector('a[href*="/status/' + tweetId + '"]')); if (!article) return { ok: false, message: 'Tweet article not found' }; const likeBtn = article.querySelector('[data-testid="like"]'); if (likeBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Already not liked' }; const unlikeBtn = article.querySelector('[data-testid="unlike"]'); if (!unlikeBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Unlike button not found' }; unlikeBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const verified = article.querySelector('[data-testid="like"]'); return { ok: !!verified, message: verified ? 'Unliked' : 'Unlike not verified' }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ ok: false, message: intermediate.error }]; return [intermediate]; }
